== Notes for [[Item:Q104870|Q104870]] ==

"David Ibn Yahya ben Yosef was born in Lisbon in 1465. He was thirty-one when he fled Portugal with his father and brothers. In Portugal, he had married Dinah...."

"Dinah had given birth to her son Yosef shortly after her arrival in Florence in 1494. "

Reference: "The Book of Destiny, Toledot Charlap" by Dr. Arthur Menton, "Chapter XXVI: Four Centuries in Iberia"

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000013598747494

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
